name: agent-temporal-superpowers
description: A skill suite for timeboxed delivery, disciplined waiting, and high-throughput agent execution.

interface.shortDescription: Time, waiting, and throughput skills for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Agent Temporal Superpowers to guide coding agents through deadline-aware delivery, bounded waits, and efficient concurrent or parallel execution.
defaultPrompt: Use the relevant Agent Temporal Superpowers skill for this task.
Complete this within 5 minutes and report useful progress before the deadline.
Process these samples with bounded concurrency and preserve output order.
